name: ableton-pocket-operations
description: Pocket Operations — a right-click drum-pattern library extension for Ableton Live 12, built on the official Extensions SDK. Patterns from Paul Wenzel's Pocket Operations booklet.
author: E. T. Carter <hi@ecarter.me>
//optionalDependencies: Ableton SDK + CLI are a proprietary beta resolved from gitignored vendor/*.tgz. 'optional' so npm install / CI succeed without them (pure tests need no SDK); building/packaging the .ablx does require them.
